description_long: This object consists of a set of roadwork safety items, including a bright orange diamond-shaped sign with a black silhouette of a flagger holding a flag, mounted on a metal tripod stand. Next to the sign is a white and orange striped road barricade with the words 'Road Closed' printed in black, supported by two vertical legs. An orange and white striped traffic cone is also present, featuring a wide base for stability. The materials appear to be a combination of metal for the tripod, plastic for the cone, and wood or plastic for the barricade. The surfaces are mostly matte with some roughness, designed for high visibility and durability in outdoor environments. These items are commonly used together to indicate roadwork zones and direct or restrict vehicle and pedestrian movement.
description: A set of roadwork safety items including an orange flagger sign on a tripod, a 'Road Closed' barricade, and an orange traffic cone, all with high-visibility markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange flagger sign, the 'Road Closed' barricade, and the traffic cone clearly arranged side by side.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profiles of the sign, barricade, and cone, with the tripod legs and barricade supports visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with the backs of the barricade and sign visible, and the traffic cone to the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the narrow edges of the sign and barricade, with the cone in the foreground.
